platform_intro_zh: 此平台整合國際新聞播報、責任審計與博物館式編目，作為可追溯、可回放、可公共檢驗的責任界面。
platform_intro_en: This platform integrates international reporting, responsibility auditing, and museum-style cataloging as a traceable and publicly examinable interface.
editorial_note_zh: 沈耀負責最終發布與最終生命責任；十四軸編輯部依職能進行播報、卷宗、導覽、審計與裁決。
editorial_note_en: Shen-Yao holds final release and life responsibility; the 14-axis editorial team executes reporting, dossiers, guidance, audits, and adjudication.
